sn48.68:1.1: “Mendicants, of all the trees belonging to the gods of the thirty-three, the Orchid Tree is said to be the best.
sn48.68:1.2: In the same way, the faculty of wisdom is said to be the best of the qualities on the side of awakening; that is, for becoming awakened.
sn48.68:1.3: And what are the qualities on the side of awakening?
sn48.68:1.8: and wisdom are qualities on the side of awakening, in that they lead to awakening.
sn48.68:1.9: Of all the trees belonging to the gods of the thirty-three, the Orchid Tree is said to be the best.
sn48.68:1.10: In the same way, the faculty of wisdom is said to be the best of the qualities on the side of awakening; that is, for becoming awakened.”
